obligation: C5 active-path (F64, one layer at a time)
oracle: HuggingFace DeepseekV2DecoderLayer in float64, one layer at a time (trusted HF code: MLA + complex RoPE/YaRN + dense-first + MoE; never the whole model in F64 -> not L4)
